title: Liberty reader ignores copyrighted content
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.51+104 (git sha1 119e998f1, g++ 11.4.0-1ubuntu1~22.04 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Starting with commit 119e998f the Liberty parser ignores any content which follows a header comment with UTF-8 encoded copyright sign (0xC2 0xA9 hex).

E.g. this input saved in `test.lib`
```
// Copyright © XY
library (test) {
}
```
is ignored by `yosys-filterlib - test.lib` (it produces no output). Meanwhile it gets processed as expected if the top copyright line is removed.

### Expected Behavior

Yosys supports proprietary technology data

### Actual Behavior

Yosys refuses copyrighted input
